facade_description: 200 Augusta Ave presents a converted house-form, semi-detached facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 3 storeys and is capped by a cross-gable, consistent with its converted house-form, semi-detached typology. The facade reads primarily as mixed (painted masonry) in a dark grey/black commercial ground floor, beige/cream upper floor palette, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade keeps a domestic opening rhythm of 2, 2 window bays from lower to upper levels, using mixed, and 1 principal entrance. Character-defining facade elements include cornice. HCD note: Each property has value as an early-twentieth-century House-form building that has been modified to accommodate a commercial conversion through ground floor alterations.
